arondight_bar.bar_prompt: A salvor with a med-brace across half his jaw sits apart from the room, nursing a single shot.
arondight_bar.bar_open_1: He doesn't ask what you want. He looks at your clothes, then at the brace scars along his own knuckles, before he starts speaking.
arondight_bar.bar_open_2: "I ran a two-boat salvage line, me and Esra. We pulled a transponder ghost off a dead freighter chain and rode the trail out long past where we should have stopped. It ends at a station we haven't found in any registry. An old station. Domain plating, old survey work, looks like it's been abandoned this entire time."
arondight_bar.bar_open_3: "Drones met us there. Polite as a customs line, right up until Esra drifted past some invisible line in their damned cursed programming. They opened her boat like a ration tin. Same pass, they let my lifeboat go. My crew thought it was some twisted broken Domain logic. Somethin' in there they don't want to let out, but the clankers are barely holding on."
arondight_bar.bar_opt_press: "You got aboard, before that. What's inside?"
arondight_bar.bar_opt_decline: Leave him to his shot (Warning. This event will never reappear)
arondight_bar.bar_press_1: He turns the shot glass a quarter turn.
arondight_bar.bar_press_2: "One hour of dock power before the watch cycled. No crew. No bodies either, mind. The corridors had been rewove. Not wrecked. Rewove, that's what they call it. Like the station ran out of patience with its own floor plan. Crew logs call the inside the Loom, and the last entry says the weave took the reactor deck and they kept feedin' it anyway."
arondight_bar.bar_press_3: "One thing aboard still seems flyable. A frame. Man-shaped, frigate-mass, sittin' in a proving gantry like it's waitin' on a pilot. Esra wanted it but I only wanted to leave."
arondight_bar.bar_take_aborted: He starts keying the fix into your slate, stops, and stares at the numbers a long moment. "No. It's gone from me tonight. Ask me another day."
arondight_bar.bar_take_1: He keys the fix into your slate, checks it, and pushes the slate back across the table.
arondight_bar.bar_take_2: "I'm done flyin'. Finish hearin' it out, cap. Whatever it's been sayin' in there, it was sayin' it to an empty room for a long time."
arondight_bar.bar_decline: He nods once and goes back to his shot.

arondight_quest.quest_loom_desc_go: Follow the salvor's fix to the %s. The station he described is somewhere in its outer reaches.
arondight_quest.quest_loom_desc_wardens: Broceliande Station holds a working proving gantry and, by the salvor's account, one flyable ship. Its warden drones still enforce a quarantine. Break the quarantine.
arondight_quest.quest_loom_desc_dock: The quarantine is down. Dock with Broceliande Station and find what's inside.
arondight_quest.quest_loom_step_wardens: Defeat the quarantine watch at Broceliande Station
arondight_quest.quest_rec_desc_relay: The reply's bearing crosses a dead relay in the %s. Whatever passed that way, the relay's buffer heard it.
arondight_quest.quest_rec_desc_escort: Machine contacts are converging on the relay. They want the record, or they want whoever pulled it.
arondight_quest.quest_rec_desc_staging: The fragments assemble into a course: a nameless anchorage in the %s. The reply came from there.
arondight_quest.quest_rec_step_escort: Defeat the escort at the relay
arondight_quest.quest_beacon_1: Your comm officer flags traffic: a tight, patterned burst out of your own hangar deck. The frame's lattice has been transmitting. Has been, your tech officer stresses. It stopped the moment anyone looked.
arondight_quest.quest_beacon_2: Sixteen hours later, every long-range board you own lights at once. One reply, very far out, very faint.
arondight_quest.quest_beacon_ledger: The lattice does not hide the entry. Against the reply's timestamp it has filed a single annotation, plain Domain text:
arondight_quest.quest_beacon_opt_done: Log the contact and plot the source
arondight_quest.quest_loomwin_1: The gate ring turns green. Behind you, the course is already going dark.
arondight_quest.quest_loomwin_2: The station makes no move to take the frame back. The gantry bay's outer doors stand open.
arondight_quest.quest_loomwin_note: The frame's lattice interface is available from the Manage screen
arondight_quest.quest_loomloss_1: The course lights die all at once, and the station's handling arms take the frame back to its cradle.
arondight_quest.quest_loomloss_2: The proving gantry sits silent on your scopes.
arondight_quest.quest_duelwin_1: What is left of it stops pretending to be a ship. The pieces fall out of formation, then out of coherence, and the harvesting field collapses to a point and is gone.
arondight_quest.quest_duelwin_2: In the quiet afterward the frame's lattice runs one full diagnostic pass, top to bottom. The beacon it lit is not transmitting.
arondight_quest.quest_duelloss_1: The harvesting field holds the frame for a long moment, reading it. Then it lets go, and you drift clear with one screen of hull warnings and every system intact.
arondight_quest.quest_duelloss_2: The Reclaimer has not left the anchorage. It will be there when you come back.
arondight_quest.quest_duel_no_frame: The frame is not with your fleet.
arondight_quest.signal_wait_hint: Transform the frame and weave the lattice from the Manage screen.
arondight_quest.signal_countdown_suffix: until the lattice's queued work completes
arondight_quest.signal_countdown_suffix_period: until the lattice's queued work completes.
arondight_quest.signal_answered: The lattice lit a beacon, and something far out answered. Its ledger names the reply: %s.

arondight_console.console_not_recovered: The frame is not recovered yet.
arondight_console.console_sealed_band: Specializations are sealed until the Reclaimer is destroyed.
arondight_console.console_block_budget: Invested story points are capped at your level. Requires level %s.
arondight_console.console_invest_cap: Invested story points are capped at your level.

arondight_forms.form_header_costs: First specialization costs 2 story points, second specialization costs 3
arondight_forms.form_block_current: This is the frame's current form.
arondight_forms.form_block_sealed: Sealed until the Reclaimer is destroyed.
arondight_forms.form_block_leaf: Respec to choose a different form.
arondight_forms.form_block_descent: Only %s's own specializations are reachable. Respec to choose another line.

arondight_weave.weave_header_logistics: Each weave also adds %s to supplies per month, recovery cost, deployment points.
arondight_weave.node_shoulder_left_desc: Unseals the left shoulder: a small missile mount.
arondight_weave.node_shoulder_right_desc: Unseals the right shoulder: a small missile mount.
arondight_weave.node_munitions_loom_desc: Missile weapons regenerate ammunition: one round every %s seconds, added to the emptiest launcher.
arondight_weave.node_arm_actuators_desc: The built-in arm weapon deals %s% more damage.
arondight_weave.node_quick_cycle_desc: System cooldowns and charge times are 25% shorter.
arondight_weave.node_zero_point_idle_desc: The zero-flux speed boost stays active at up to %s% more flux.
arondight_weave.node_watchdog_remotes_desc: Two point-defense drones orbit the frame. A destroyed drone is replaced after %s seconds.
arondight_weave.node_self_weave_desc: Regenerates hull in combat: %s% every 10 seconds, up to %s% per engagement.
arondight_weave.node_afterimage_desc: A hull hit of %s% of max hull or more triggers a %s-unit blink along the frame's facing. %s-second cooldown.
arondight_weave.node_static_bleed_desc: While venting, EMP arcs strike the nearest enemy within %s units for %s damage, piercing shields.
arondight_weave.node_harvest_reflex_desc: Destroying a ship restores %s% hull, %s% armor, and %s% combat readiness.
arondight_weave.node_kinetic_buffer_desc: %s% of hull damage taken converts to soft flux.
arondight_weave.weave_hover_unavailable: Unavailable: a capability this node needs failed to load.
arondight_weave.respec_hover_unwind_relock: Unwinds every woven node and re-locks the selected forms (%s).
arondight_weave.respec_hover_shoulders: Weapons in unsealed shoulder mounts return to cargo.
arondight_weave.respec_hover_op_strip: If the loadout then exceeds the frame's ordnance points, the lowest-value weapons move to cargo.
arondight_weave.respec_hover_op_strip_as_well: If the loadout then exceeds the frame's ordnance points, the lowest-value weapons move to cargo as well.
arondight_weave.respec_spent_on_nodes_and_forms: spent on woven nodes and selected forms
arondight_weave.weave_block_capability: Unavailable: incompatible game version. See starsector.log.

arondight_hullmods.hullmod_hand_reason: Grown by the lattice. Cannot be added or removed by hand.

arondight_combat.combat_loom_fire_lock: FIRE CONTROL LOCKED FOR THE TRIAL
